info.title: Youtube Trending Videos 2025 updated daily
info.subtitle: Data collected from 90+ countries
info.description:
This dataset contains trending YouTube videos collected from multiple countries using the YouTube API. It includes key metadata such as video titles, channels, views, likes, comments, and publication dates. The dataset focuses on identifying popular content trends across different regions, helping analyze which creators, topics, or videos gain traction globally.

It covers data from countries like the US, UK, India, Canada, Australia, South Korea, and Hong Kong, with daily updates. This dataset can be used for trend analysis, content strategy insights, and audience engagement studies.

*COLUMNS*
-  0   video_id       non-null   object
-  1   title         non-null   object
-  2   channel       non-null   object
-  3   country       non-null   object
- 4   views         non-null   int64 
-  5   likes         non-null   int64 
-  6   comments      non-null   int64 
-  7   published_at  non-null   object
- 8   fetch_date    non-null   object

List of countries:
